// TEMPLATE: Prompt handler type — injects text into the model's next turn
// USAGE: The 'prompt' handler type is useful for policy gates, session context injection, and dynamic instructions

PreToolUse.// PURPOSE: Inject security reminder before any file write in sensitive dirs
PreToolUse.prompt: SECURITY: You are editing a security-sensitive file. Double-check for injection vulnerabilities, credential exposure, and OWASP Top 10 before proceeding.

SessionStart.// PURPOSE: Load dynamic project context at session start
SessionStart.prompt: Read PROJECT_STATE.md if it exists, then reconcile against git log before starting work.
